title: Research metrics benchmark seed
prompt: Build a local project brain for a small TypeScript package and report component, flow, evidence, and unknown coverage.

pass: The benchmark-ready JSON reports component, flow, evidence, and unknown coverage.
The output is deterministic for repeated runs with the same fixture and timestamp.
The task stays local and does not require credentials.
fail: Coverage is inferred from a model call instead of local project facts.
Expected research artifact paths are missing.
